message:
test(bd-ar72): cover handler trait async delegation and definition overrides

Add 11 new unit tests for handler.rs covering: ToolHandler with custom
tags and annotations in definition, async delegation via block_on for
call_async/read_async/get_async, read_async_with_uri branching on empty
vs non-empty params, async error propagation, and mounted handler async
delegation for call_async/read_async/read_async_with_uri/get_async.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
